speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. Let us go ahead for the sake of this, roll initiative depending on what happens going forward just so we have that.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Hope we don't have to leave that way, but she can just dispel it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I mean, we can get it out.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so, who is standing where? Is there any particular placement you guys wish to--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Vax and I are on either side of the door.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so you guys are here. All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So is this leading into something crazy?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Into his cell.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Into a labyrinth? Or just his cell?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As far so you know, a cell.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: As far as we know, just a cell.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He just completely took an expensive thing and left us to rot, pretty much, I think.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Anyone else want to change this arrangement?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We are in a giant death cluster. How about we spread out a touch? Like two people to a door in that hallway.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All right, I'll take the other door.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'll take the other door.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'll go down with Scanlan on the other one so I can ranged attack--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm just saying, if he took out a magical spectacle and knows we're full of shit, we're all gonna die.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm gonna stand with my back against the wall that she's built up. Like that, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Did half-orc dude say he was just in this cell? That's all he said?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They essentially unlocked the cell, they're walking away, they're turning their heads and letting you do what you want.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: How do we know that's the one that he's in?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We don't.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let's find out.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Why don't you go in and kill some shit?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Everyone's good with this arrangement?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Is there any other entrances or anything else around?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There's just this door and this door and they're both currently--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Fine, go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And I called out already.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I would like to rage.
